Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPVS1 ;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform FHIR Vital Signs Functions;5/19/2017 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERAN PLATFORM;**19**;Jul 15, 2017;Build 1 ;;Per VHA Directive 2004-038, this routine should not be modified. ; ; External References DBIA# ; ------------------- ----- ; DVPXUTL ; GMVUTL 1446 ; Q ; RDVS(SOURCE,TARGET) ; Vital Signs READ N DFN,ICN,VITALSIG,DVPCNT,SMRY S (DFN,ICN)="",SMRY=0 N X F X="vitalSignsId" D INITPARM^DVPUTL(.X) S DVPSITE=$$SITE^VASITE,DVPSTN=$P(DVPSITE,U,3) I VITALSIG="" D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","required","MSG_RESOURCE_ID_MISSING","Parameter vitalSignsId is required.","RDVS^DVPVS1") I '$$SITECHK^DVPXUTL(VITALSIG,"RDMR^DVPMR") G QUIT I $P(VITALSIG,":",5)="",+$P(VITALSIG,":",6)=0 D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","code-invalid","MSG_ID_INVALID","The supplied vitalSignsId "_VITALSIG_" has an invalid format.","RDVS^DVPVS1") S ICN=$P(VITALSIG,":",5) I $$PATCHECK^DVPUTLS(ICN,"RDMR^DVPMR")=0 G QUIT N VS D GETREC^GMVUTL(.VS,$P(VITALSIG,":",6),1) I $G(VS(0))="" D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(TARGET,"fatal","not-found","MSG_NO_EXIST","No vitalSign record found for vitalSignId: "_VITALSIG_".","RDVS^DVPVS1") N RECSET D FHIRVS(.RECSET,VITALSIG,0) M @TARGET@("results","vitalSigns")=RECSET QUIT ; Q FHIRVS(REC,VUID,SMRY) ; N IEN,ARRAY,VS S IEN=$P(VUID,":",6) D GETREC^GMVUTL(.VS,IEN,1) I VS(5)'="" D . N IX,CNT S CNT=0 F IX=1:1:20 D . . I $P(VS(5),U,IX)'="" S CNT=CNT+1,VS(5,CNT)=$P(VS(5),U,IX) ; identifier K ARRAY D FHIRVS^DVPXUTL(.ARRAY,ICN,IEN) M REC=ARRAY ; category I 'SMRY D . S REC("category","coding",1,"system")="http://hl7.org/fhir/observation-category" . S REC("category","coding",1,"code")="vital-signs" ; status I 'SMRY S REC("status")="final" I 'SMRY,+$P($G(VS(2)),U)>0 S REC("status")="entered-in-error" ;subject I 'SMRY D . K ARRAY D FHIRPAT^DVPXUTL(.ARRAY,$P(VUID,":",5)) . M REC("subject")=ARRAY ; effective I 'SMRY S REC("effective")=$$FHIRDTTM^DVPXUTL($P(VS(0),U)) ; issued S REC("issued")=$$FHIRDTTM^DVPXUTL($P(VS(0),U,4)) ; performer K ARRAY D FHIRPRC^DVPXUTL(.ARRAY,$P(VS(0),U,6)) M REC("performer")=ARRAY ;interpretation I 'SMRY S REC("interpretation")=$S($P(VS(0),U,11)="*":"abnormal",1:"normal") ;values and codes I SMRY G QUIT2 K ARRAY I $P(VS(0),U,3)=9 D GETW K ARRAY D BLDIDENT(.ARRAY,"W") ;weight I $P(VS(0),U,3)=2 D GETT K ARRAY D BLDIDENT(.ARRAY,"T") ;temperature I $P(VS(0),U,3)=1 D ;blood pressure . D GETBP K ARRAY N TY S TY=$S($P($P(VS(0),U,8),"/",2)="":"BPM",1:"BP") . D BLDIDENT(.ARRAY,TY) I $P(VS(0),U,3)=5 D GETP K ARRAY D BLDIDENT(.ARRAY,"P") ;pressure I $P(VS(0),U,3)=3 D GETR K ARRAY D BLDIDENT(.ARRAY,"R") ;repiratory rate I $P(VS(0),U,3)=21 D GETRO2 K ARRAY D BLDIDENT(.ARRAY,"RO2") ;oxigen I $P(VS(0),U,3)=8 D ;height / height lying . D GETH K ARRAY N TY S TY=$S($G(REC("method",1,"coding"))="Ly":"HL",1:"H") . D BLDIDENT(.ARRAY,TY) I $P(VS(0),U,3)=22 D GETPN K ARRAY D BLDIDENT(.ARRAY,"PN") ;pain ; code M REC("code")=ARRAY QUIT2 ; Q ; GETW ;WEIGHT ; value(s) S X=$P(VS(0),U,8)_U_"pound (US and British)"_U_"http://unitsofmeasure.org"_U_"[lb_av]" K ARRAY D FHIRQTY^DVPXUTL(.ARRAY,X) M REC("valueQuantity")=ARRAY ; extras N LIST,VAL S LIST="72;71;106;91;115;92;93",VAL=$$EXCTPRMS(.LIST) I VAL'="" S REC("comments")=$P(VAL,U) N LIST,VAL S LIST="42;43;44;114",VAL=$$EXCTPRMS(.LIST) I VAL'="" S REC("method","coding")=$P(VAL,U,2),REC("method","text")=$P(VAL,U) Q ; GETT ;TEMPERATURE ; value(s) S X=$P(VS(0),U,8)_U_"degree Fahrenheit"_U_"http://unitsofmeasure.org"_U_"[degF]" K ARRAY D FHIRQTY^DVPXUTL(.ARRAY,X) M REC("valueQuantity")=ARRAY ; extras N LIST,VAL S LIST="5;40;6;7;46;97;45",VAL=$$EXCTPRMS(.LIST) I VAL'="" S REC("method","coding")=$P(VAL,U,2),REC("method","text")=$P(VAL,U) Q ; GETBP ;BLOOD PRESSURE ; value(s) ;determine what type of BP it is ;S $P(VS(0),U,8)="120/120/120" I $P($P(VS(0),U,8),"/",2)="" D ;One entry only . S X=$P($P(VS(0),U,8),"/")_U_"millimeter of mercury"_U_"http://unitsofmeasure.org"_U_"mm[Hg]" . K ARRAY D FHIRQTY^DVPXUTL(.ARRAY,X) M REC("valueQuantity")=ARRAY I $P($P(VS(0),U,8),"/",2)'="",$P($P(VS(0),U,8),"/",3)="" D ;Two entries only . K ARRAY D BLDIDENT(.ARRAY,"BPS") M REC("component",1,"code")=ARRAY . S X=$P($P(VS(0),U,8),"/")_U_"millimeter of mercury"_U_"http://unitsofmeasure.org"_U_"mm[Hg]" . K ARRAY D FHIRQTY^DVPXUTL(.ARRAY,X) M REC("component",1,"valueQuantity")=ARRAY . K ARRAY D BLDIDENT(.ARRAY,"BPD") M REC("component",1,"code")=ARRAY . S X=$P($P(VS(0),U,8),"/",2)_U_"millimeter of mercury"_U_"http://unitsofmeasure.org"_U_"mm[Hg]" . K ARRAY D FHIRQTY^DVPXUTL(.ARRAY,X) M REC("component",2,"valueQuantity")=ARRAY I $P($P(VS(0),U,8),"/",2)'="",$P($P(VS(0),U,8),"/",3)'="" D ;Three entries . K ARRAY D BLDIDENT(.ARRAY,"BPS") M REC("component",1,"code")=ARRAY . S X=$P($P(VS(0),U,8),"/")_U_"millimeter of mercury"_U_"http://unitsofmeasure.org"_U_"mm[Hg]" . K ARRAY D FHIRQTY^DVPXUTL(.ARRAY,X) M REC("component",1,"valueQuantity")=ARRAY . K ARRAY D BLDIDENT(.ARRAY,"BPM") M REC("component",2,"code")=ARRAY . S X=$P($P(VS(0),U,8),"/",2)_U_"millimeter of mercury"_U_"http://unitsofmeasure.org"_U_"mm[Hg]" . K ARRAY D FHIRQTY^DVPXUTL(.ARRAY,X) M REC("component",2,"valueQuantity")=ARRAY . K ARRAY D BLDIDENT(.ARRAY,"BPD") M REC("component",3,"code")=ARRAY . S X=$P($P(VS(0),U,8),"/",3)_U_"millimeter of mercury"_U_"http://unitsofmeasure.org"_U_"mm[Hg]" . K ARRAY D FHIRQTY^DVPXUTL(.ARRAY,X) M REC("component",3,"valueQuantity")=ARRAY ; extras N LIST,VAL S LIST="52;104;50;51;116",VAL=$$EXCTPRMS(.LIST) I VAL'="" D BLDMTD(VAL) N LIST,VAL S LIST="57;53;2;3;1;4;23",VAL=$$EXCTPRMS(.LIST) I VAL'="" S REC("bodySite",1,"coding")=$P(VAL,U,2),REC("bodySite",1,"text")=$P(VAL,U) N LIST,VAL S LIST="124;123;119;64;98;110;60;122;65;59;121",VAL=$$EXCTPRMS(.LIST) I VAL'="" S REC("comments")=$P(VAL,U) Q ; GETP ;PULSE ; value(s) S X=$P(VS(0),U,8)_U_"per minute"_U_"http://unitsofmeasure.org"_U_"/min" K ARRAY D FHIRQTY^DVPXUTL(.ARRAY,X) M REC("valueQuantity")=ARRAY ; extras N LIST,VAL S LIST="22;118;25;57;38;56;53;39;24;54;55;23;58",VAL=$$EXCTPRMS(.LIST) I VAL'="" S REC("bodySite",1,"coding")=$P(VAL,U,2),REC("bodySite",1,"text")=$P(VAL,U) N LIST,VAL S LIST="62;63",VAL=$$EXCTPRMS(.LIST) I VAL'="" S REC("comments")=$G(REC("comments"))_" "_$P(VAL,U) N LIST,VAL S LIST="52;104;50;51",VAL=$$EXCTPRMS(.LIST) I VAL'="" S REC("comments")=$G(REC("comments"))_" "_$P(VAL,U) N LIST,VAL S LIST="124;119;61;60;122;99;101;65;59;121",VAL=$$EXCTPRMS(.LIST) I VAL'="" D BLDMTD(VAL) S REC("comments")=$$TRIM^XLFSTR($G(REC("comments"))) Q ; GETR ;RESPIRATION ; value(s) S X=$P(VS(0),U,8)_U_"per minute"_U_"http://unitsofmeasure.org"_U_"/min" K ARRAY D FHIRQTY^DVPXUTL(.ARRAY,X) M REC("valueQuantity")=ARRAY ; extras N LIST,VAL S LIST="52;50;51",VAL=$$EXCTPRMS(.LIST) I VAL'="" S REC("comments")=$G(REC("comments"))_" "_$P(VAL,U) N LIST,VAL S LIST="124;49;119;48;101;47;88;121",VAL=$$EXCTPRMS(.LIST) I VAL'="" S REC("comments")=$G(REC("comments"))_" "_$P(VAL,U) S REC("comments")=$$TRIM^XLFSTR($G(REC("comments"))) Q ; GETRO2 ;RESPIRATION OXIMETRY ; value(s) S X=$P(VS(0),U,8)_U_"percent"_U_"http://unitsofmeasure.org"_U_"%" K ARRAY D FHIRQTY^DVPXUTL(.ARRAY,X) M REC("valueQuantity")=ARRAY I $P(VS(0),U,10)'="" S REC("comments")=$P(VS(0),U,10) ; extras N LIST,VAL S LIST="83;124;120;49;119;117;113;48;112;82;96;80;101;109;84;85;86;107;128;103;81;87;105;88;89;121;95",VAL=$$EXCTPRMS(.LIST) I VAL'="" D BLDMTD(VAL) Q ; GETH ;HEIGHT ; value(s) S REC("valueQuantity","value")=$P(VS(0),U,8) S REC("valueQuantity","unit")="inch international" S REC("valueQuantity","system")="http://unitsofmeasure.org" S REC("valueQuantity","code")="[in_i]" N LIST,VAL S LIST="42;43;127;114",VAL=$$EXCTPRMS(.LIST) I VAL'="" D BLDMTD(VAL) Q ; GETPN ;PAIN ; value(s) S REC("valueQuantity","value")=$P(VS(0),U,8) Q ; BLDIDENT(REC,TY) ; Builds a identifier node using CCDS ;TY: TYPE as 120.51 codes + HL FOR HEIGHT HORRIZONTAL (need to check field) + BPS BPD ( for Blood pressume values array) N CODE S CODE=$S(TY="R":"9279-1",TY="P":"8867-4",TY="RO2":"59408-5",TY="T":"8310-5",TY="H":"8302-2",TY="HL":"8306-3",TY="W":"29463-7",TY="BP":"55284-4",TY="BPS":"8480-6",TY="BPD":"8462-4",TY="BPM":"8478-0",1:"") Q:CODE="" N DISPLAY I TY="R" S DISPLAY="Respiratory rate" I TY="P" S DISPLAY="Heart rate" I TY="RO2" S DISPLAY="Oxygen saturation in Arterial blood by Pulse oximetry" I TY="T" S DISPLAY="Body temperature" I TY="H" S DISPLAY="Body height" I TY="HL" S DISPLAY="Body height --lying" I TY="W" S DISPLAY="Body weight" I TY="BP" S DISPLAY="Blood pressure systolic and diastolic" I TY="BPS" S DISPLAY="Systolic blood pressure" I TY="BPD" S DISPLAY="Diastolic blood pressure" I TY="BPM" S DISPLAY="Mean blood pressure" ; S REC("system")="http://loinc.org" S REC("code")=CODE,REC("display")=DISPLAY,REC("use")="usual" Q EXCTPRMS(LIST) ; Looks up the user selections for entries in list and returns code/text N RET,IX,IX2 S (IX,IX2,RET)="" F IX=1:1:40 Q:$P(LIST,";",IX)="" S LIST($P(LIST,";",IX))="" F S IX=$O(LIST(IX)) Q:IX="" D . F S IX2=$O(VS(5,IX2)) Q:IX2="" D . . I IX=VS(5,IX2) S RET=$G(^GMRD(120.52,IX,0)) Q RET ; BLDMTD(VAL) ; S REC("method",1,"coding","code")=$P(VAL,U,2),(REC("method",1,"text"),REC("method",1,"coding","display"))=$P(VAL,U) Q
